ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock for the options trade */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the trade (e.g., positive or negative movement) */,
  "put_premium" REAL /* Premium for the put option */,
  "call_premium" REAL /* Premium for the call option */,
  "exercise_ratio" REAL /* Exercise ratio for the option */,
  "efficiency_ratio" REAL /* Efficiency ratio of the trade execution */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader who executed the trade */,
  "trade_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the options strategy employed in the trade */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade execution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_trades_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_trades_trade_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_strategy_id") REFERENCES option_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_trades_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES trade_executions ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader in the organization */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the trader belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor of the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade being analyzed */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating associated with the trade */,
  "market_conditions" TEXT /* Market conditions during the trade execution */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analysis_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol related to the market data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during that day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during that day */,
  "market_index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index related to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed in the session */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of trades executed in the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade execution (e.g., executed, pending, failed) */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated trade */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk associated with the trade (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "mitigation_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy to mitigate the risk */,
  "mitigation_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk mitigation strategy was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trader_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, trade execution) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_result" TEXT /* Result of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_activity_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy (e.g., Straddle, Covered Call) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of options strategy (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "strategy_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_expiration_dates" (
  "expiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration date record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade associated with the expiration */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date on which the option expires */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_expiration_dates_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade for which metrics are being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., ROI, Sharpe Ratio) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark used for evaluating the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade being evaluated for compliance */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)
